from pathlib import Path
import ast
import hashlib
import json

root = Path("Z:/FOXAI")
drop = root / "AGENT_FOX_V1A3C4"
installed = root / "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks = [
    (drop / "workshop_main_dependency_closure_v1.py", installed / "workshop_main_dependency_closure_v1.py", "4de5b362a62d018dcaa375ab5e60413209c9abe00e2bfd36c15468dc1d8aebd2"),
    (drop / "WORKSHOP_MAIN_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1.json", installed / "WORKSHOP_MAIN_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1.json", "2002bc4655bffa93b708770ea7c60b5c47dd7a8ace88a5f938847684e09acd53"),
    (drop / "README_V1A3C4.md", installed / "README_V1A3C4.md", "aecf02bf946c97130d5f4c4d4e1f9d961a637db3c52c7de6521bd1834177339f"),
]
for source, target, expected_hash in checks:
    assert source.is_file(), source
    assert target.is_file(), target
    assert hashlib.sha256(source.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected_hash
    assert hashlib.sha256(target.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected_hash

script_text = (installed / "workshop_main_dependency_closure_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script_text, str(installed / "workshop_main_dependency_closure_v1.py"), "exec")
tree = ast.parse(script_text)
imports = set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node, ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split(".")[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split(".")[0])
forbidden = {
    "subprocess", "socket", "urllib", "http", "ftplib", "requests",
    "pip", "ensurepip", "psutil", "winreg", "ctypes", "webbrowser",
    "importlib",
}
assert not (imports & forbidden), sorted(imports & forbidden)

contract = json.loads((installed / "WORKSHOP_MAIN_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract["mission_id"] == "ENG-20260721-230137-C4D02A"
assert contract["protected_direct_context_count"] == 1
assert contract["target"]["context_id"] == "CTX-68030A15EE97A526"
assert contract["target"]["path_group_id"] == "PATHGROUP-266CA7411F12A68D"
assert contract["target"]["resolved_interpreter_path"] is None
assert contract["target"]["runtime_id"] is None
assert contract["scope"]["runtime_alias_must_remain_unresolved"] is True
assert contract["scope"]["live_path_query_allowed"] is False
assert contract["scope"]["python_alias_execution_allowed"] is False
assert contract["scope"]["manager_context_rebuilt"] is False
assert contract["scope"]["maximum_reads_per_reached_source"] == 1
assert contract["scope"]["source_buffer_ceiling_bytes"] == 8388608
assert contract["scope"]["total_output_ceiling_bytes"] == 8388608
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3C4_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")
